title: lippia burtonii
intro: Lippia burtonii, also known as African herb, is a perennial herb native to South Africa, belonging to the family Verbenaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lippia burtonii include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Lippia burtonii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
